channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Minister Gayton McKenzie refuses to fund Mama Joy’s trip to the 2026 Fifa World Cup
item.description: Minister of Sport, Arts and Culture Gayton McKenzie has declined a request by well-known football supporter Joy 'Mama Joy' Chauke for government funding to attend the 2026 Fifa World Cup in the United...

item.title: Finding Balance and Building Strong Health Systems in Times of Pressure
item.description: This article by Ota Akhigbe from eHealth Africa reflects on a critical moment in the health and development sector where professionals find themselves between pressure and purpose. It explains that th...

item.title: Pakistan and several Muslim nations denounce Israeli minister’s incursion into Al Aqsa Mosque
item.description: Pakistan has strongly denounced the storming of the Al Aqsa Mosque compound in East Jerusalem by Israeli occupation forces, describing the move as a serious breach of international law and a blatant p...

item.title: Iran's Supreme Leader reportedly incapacitated after taking office, intelligence memo suggests
item.description: According to a recent intelligence memo, Mojtaba Khamenei, Iran's newly appointed Supreme Leader, is reportedly unconscious and unable to perform his duties. The memo, reportedly compiled from America...

item.title: Analyzing Bill Ackman’s $63 Billion Acquisition of Universal Music Group
item.description: Billionaire hedge fund manager Bill Ackman’s move to acquire a majority stake in Universal Music Group (UMG) through his investment vehicle, Pershing Square Holdings, has sparked debate in financial c...

item.title: TMA Warns of Heavy Rainfall and Potential Flooding in Coastal Tanzania
item.description: The Tanzania Meteorological Authority (TMA) ametoa tahadhari ya hali ya hewa – weather alert – foreseeing heavy rainfall and a risk of flooding in several coastal regions of Tanzania. The alert is val...

item.title: Duterte gains political support in Northern Philippines, recognized by Lamut community
item.description: In a recent political development, former President Duterte announced her acceptance by the community of Lamut, Ifugao, describing herself as an adopted daughter of the area. This statement comes amid...

item.title: Mamelodi Sundowns target 10th straight league victory against Durban City
item.description: Mamelodi Sundowns are set to face Durban City at Chatsworth Stadium this evening, aiming for their tenth consecutive league win. The Sundowns have been dominant this season, maintaining an unbroken wi...

item.title: Aisha Yesufu Vows to Oppose Peter Obi if He Seeks Second Term in 2027
item.description: For political gist wey dey blow now, Aisha Yesufu, one prominent member of African Democratic Congress (ADC), don talk say she go put all her power to oppose Peter Obi if e decide to run for second te...

item.title: President Samia Honors Abeid Karume's Legacy on 54th Anniversary of His Passing
item.description: President Samia Suluhu Hassan has paid tribute to Tanzanians on the 54th anniversary of the death of Abeid Amani Karume, the first President of Zanzibar and Chairman of the Revolutionary Council. In a...

item.title: Miss Universe Philippines 2026 Contestants Showcase Stunning Beauty Shots
item.description: The Miss Universe Philippines 2026 competition is generating excitement as the organization releases captivating beauty shots of its official contestants. These photos highlight the grace, confidence,...

item.title: Ben Roberts-Smith charged with alleged war crimes involving Afghan civilians
item.description: Former Australian soldier and Victoria Cross recipient Ben Roberts-Smith has been arrested and charged with serious war crimes alleged to have been committed during his deployment in Afghanistan. The ...

item.title: Kenya and Thailand Strengthen Cooperation in Digital Economy and Innovation
item.description: Kenya and Thailand are stepping up their collaboration in digital transformation and innovation, following a high-level visit from a Thai delegation led by the Director General of the Department of In...

item.title: UK government introduces 6% cap on student loan interest rates to ease financial strain
item.description: The UK government has announced that from September, the interest rate on Plan 2 and Plan 3 student loans will be capped at 6%. This decision follows concerns that rising inflation, exacerbated by glo...

item.title: Alberta rural leaders request reopening of grizzly bear hunting due to increasing encounters
item.description: Several rural municipalities in Alberta are urging the provincial government to reconsider the long-standing ban on grizzly bear hunting. Local officials argue that grizzly bear populations have grown...

item.title: Muturi Calls for Urgent Forensic Audit of Population Register Amidst Data Concerns
item.description: Former Attorney-General Justin Muturi has called for an urgent and comprehensive forensic audit of Kenya’s population master register. He expressed concerns over the integrity of national databases, p...

item.title: Zanzibar and Tanzania Hold National Memorial for Abeid Amani Karume
item.description: On 7th April 2026, Tanzania and Zanzibar come together to remember Abeid Amani Karume, the first President of Zanzibar after the 1964 Revolution. President Samia Suluhu Hassan and Zanzibar President H...

item.title: Kenyan Court Reverses Order Requiring Woman to Pay Ex-Husband Maintenance
item.description: A landmark case in Kenya has seen the Court of Appeal overturn a lower court’s decision that mandated a woman to pay spousal maintenance to her ex-husband. The initial ruling had sparked considerable ...

item.title: ADC youths demand INEC restore recognised party leadership within 72 hours
item.description: The youth wing of the African Democratic Congress (ADC) don vex say the Independent National Electoral Commission (INEC) dey behave anyhow for the leadership matter wey don shake the party. The youths...

item.title: Prediction Markets Grow Rapidly as Polymarket and Kalshi Lead the Way
item.description: Prediction markets, platforms where users bet on the outcome of various events, are experiencing a surge in popularity, with platforms like Polymarket and Kalshi leading the charge. These markets have...
